header.title: Integration guide
header.subtitle: Follow these steps to set up your environment and integrate Puntored APIs into your application.

hero.title: Welcome to Puntored
hero.subtitle: APIs for payments, top-ups, cash-in/out, and consumer data. 35+ countries, a single integration point.

capabilities.title: Platform Capabilities
capabilities.description: Three API categories covering the full cycle of financial services for your business in LATAM.

prepaid.title: Prepaid & Content
prepaid.description: Mobile top-ups, data packages, voice and SMS. Content PINs for streaming, gaming, and software licenses.

payments.title: Payments & Banking
payments.description: Public and private bill payments, bank cash-in/cash-out, account inquiries, and status checks.

data.title: Data Intelligence
data.description: Basic and advanced transactional analysis, category history, user activity, and consumer profiling.

steps.title: How It Works
steps.subtitle: Steps to integrate and launch your financial service

1.title: Choose your country and product
1.description: Select from 35+ LATAM countries and the products you need to integrate.

2.title: Integrate and launch
2.description: Use our task-based documentation and Postman collections to go live.

latam.title: 35+ countries
latam.description: Unified LATAM coverage through a single integration point

timeToMarket.title: Fast time-to-market
timeToMarket.description: SDKs, Postman collections, and task-based docs ready to use

security.title: Financial-grade security
security.description: OAuth 2.0 authentication, in-transit encryption, and transaction auditing
